summary: NENO Exchange feature fully tested. 21/21 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend components verified: 3 tabs (Acquista/Vendi/Off-Ramp), 8 asset buttons, quote preview, balances panel, conversion rates, transaction history. Dashboard integration working with 'Apri Exchange' link.
critical_code_review_comments: NENO Exchange backend correctly implements fixed EUR 10,000 price
0.3% fee applied correctly on all buy/sell/offramp operations
12 supported assets including EUR, USD, BNB, ETH, USDT, BTC, USDC, MATIC
Off-ramp to card returns 'completed' status, bank returns 'processing' (SEPA)
Error handling works correctly for insufficient balance and missing card_id
Settlement engine CONVERSION_RATES updated with NENO at EUR 10000
Frontend UI in Italian as requested (Acquista, Vendi, Tassi di conversione, etc.)
Transaction history shows buy/sell/offramp with correct status badges
seed_data_creation: NENO buy/sell/offramp transactions created during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: NENO Exchange feature fully implemented and tested. Route is /neno-exchange. NENO price fixed at EUR 10,000. Supports buy/sell with 8 assets (EUR, USD, BNB, ETH, USDT, BTC, USDC, MATIC). Off-ramp supports card (NIUM) and bank (SEPA). All endpoints working correctly.

mocked_apis.conversion_rates: Fixed internal rates, not live market
mocked_apis.sepa_withdrawal: Processing status (real banking would trigger via webhook)

neno_exchange_backend.GET /api/neno-exchange/quote (buy BTC): PASS - returns BTC cost with rate
neno_exchange_backend.POST /api/neno-exchange/buy (EUR): PASS - buys NENO, debits EUR, credits NENO
neno_exchange_backend.POST /api/neno-exchange/offramp (card): PASS - off-ramps to card with EUR credit

neno_exchange_frontend.asset_buttons: PASS - 8 asset buttons (EUR, BNB, ETH, USDT, BTC, USDC, MATIC, USD)
neno_exchange_frontend.quote_preview: PASS - shows rate, fee, total cost

dashboard_integration.neno_exchange_card: PASS - '$NENO Exchange' card with 'Apri Exchange' button
